label: Audience & Persona Builder
description: Detailed user/customer profiles, demographics, motivations, and pain points.

label: Problem / Opportunity Framer
description: Articulates the specific gap or need the concept addresses.

label: Goals & Success Metrics
description: Defines what winning looks like with measurable outcomes.

label: Constraints Mapper
description: Budget, time, skills, regulations, and physical limits.

label: Assumptions Log
description: Surfaces things being taken for granted that should be validated.

label: Audience Validation Planner
description: Methods and questions to test assumptions about target users before building.

label: Proof of Concept Planner
description: Defines the smallest testable version and how to test it.

label: Risk Assessment
description: What could go wrong, likelihood, severity, and mitigation strategies.

label: Regulatory & Compliance Check
description: Legal, licensing, safety, and industry-specific rules.

label: Trend & Timing Analysis
description: Whether the timing is right and why, relevant trend signals.

label: Team & Resource Planner
description: Who and what is needed, roles, skills gaps, hiring needs.

label: Budget & Cost Estimator
description: Full project cost breakdown by phase across all project types.

label: Dependency Mapper
description: What must happen before what, critical path identification.

label: Operations Planner
description: Day-to-day logistics once the concept is live.

label: Data Model Planner
description: Entities, relationships, data types, and storage needs.

label: Security & Compliance Layer
description: Auth strategy, data protection, privacy, and access control.

label: Brand Identity Framework
description: Name, voice, tone, visual language, and core values.

label: Design Language Guide
description: Color direction, typography, and style references.

label: Narrative & Story Arc
description: Story structure for writing, film, games, or brand storytelling.

label: Character & World Builder
description: Character profiles, world rules, and lore for fiction, screenplays, and games.

label: Content Strategy
description: What content is needed, in what format, when, and for whom.

label: Creative Direction Brief
description: Visual and tonal reference points, mood board prompts.

label: Space Program
description: Areas and rooms needed, their functions and spatial relationships.

label: Materials & Finish Selector
description: Surfaces, textures, and key material choices.

label: Footprint & Flow Diagram
description: How people move through the space or interact with the product.

label: Vendor & Supplier Map
description: Who provides what physically and sourcing strategy.

label: Equipment & Inventory List
description: Hardware, tools, stock, and physical assets needed.

label: Launch Strategy
description: How and when to introduce this to the world.

label: Distribution & Channel Planner
description: How it reaches its audience and channel mix.

label: Pricing Strategy
description: How value is captured and pricing model options.

label: Marketing & Messaging Framework
description: What to say, where to say it, and to whom.

label: Partnership & Outreach Map
description: Collaborators, press, influencers, and key relationships.

label: Community & Retention Plan
description: How to keep people engaged after launch.

label: Revenue Model Designer
description: How this makes money, model options, and unit economics.

label: Financial Projection Builder
description: Basic P&L, break-even, cash flow, and projections.

label: Funding & Investment Map
description: Bootstrapped, grants, investors, and crowdfunding paths.

label: Business Model Canvas
description: Lean one-page business structure overview.

label: Legal & IP Planner
description: Entity type, IP protection strategy, and key contracts needed.

label: Production Bible
description: Full reference doc: characters, world rules, tone, chapter/episode breakdowns.

label: Investor Deck Outline
description: Structured framework for a funding presentation.
